checks.description: Domain-joined systems must use Windows 11 Enterprise Edition 64-bit version.
Windows 11 account lockout duration must be configured to 15 minutes or greater.
The minimum password age must be configured to at least 1 day.
The "Access this computer from the network" user right must only be assigned to the Administrators and Remote Desktop Users groups.

check.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$domain=(Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem).PartOfDomain; if (-not $domain) { 'Compliant'; exit }; $cfg=Join-Path $env:TEMP ('automatestig-'+[guid]::NewGuid()+'.inf'); secedit /export /areas USER_RIGHTS /cfg $cfg | Out-Null; $line=(Get-Content $cfg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_ -like 'SeDenyBatchLogonRight*' } | Select-Object -First 1); Remove-Item $cfg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $values=@(); if ($line -match '=(.*)$') { $values=@($Matches[1].Split(',') | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim().TrimStart('*') } | Where-Object { $_ }) }; $suffixes=@($values | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match 'S-1-5-.+-(512|519)$') { $Matches[1] } }); if ((($suffixes | Sort-Object -Unique) -contains '512') -and (($suffixes | Sort-Object -Unique) -contains '519')) { 'Compliant' }"

checks.description: The "Deny log on as a batch job" user right on domain-joined workstations must be configured to prevent access from highly privileged domain accounts.

check.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$domain=(Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem).PartOfDomain; if (-not $domain) { 'Compliant'; exit }; $cfg=Join-Path $env:TEMP ('automatestig-'+[guid]::NewGuid()+'.inf'); secedit /export /areas USER_RIGHTS /cfg $cfg | Out-Null; $line=(Get-Content $cfg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_ -like 'SeDenyServiceLogonRight*' } | Select-Object -First 1); Remove-Item $cfg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $values=@(); if ($line -match '=(.*)$') { $values=@($Matches[1].Split(',') | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim().TrimStart('*') } | Where-Object { $_ }) }; $suffixes=@($values | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match 'S-1-5-.+-(512|519)$') { $Matches[1] } }); if ((($suffixes | Sort-Object -Unique) -contains '512') -and (($suffixes | Sort-Object -Unique) -contains '519')) { 'Compliant' }"

checks.description: The "Deny log on as a service" user right on Windows 11 domain-joined workstations must be configured to prevent access from highly privileged domain accounts.
Internet Explorer must be disabled for Windows 11.
